# elizaos-plugins/plugin-evm Daily Update (Apr 25, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 25, 2026, focused on expanding network compatibility for the `plugin-evm` framework. The primary achievement was the integration of Radius Network support across Rust and Python implementations, ensuring broader chain accessibility for AI agents.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Network Integration
* Added support for Radius Network (chain ID `723487`) and its testnet (chain ID `72344`) to both Rust and Python implementations of the plugin. [#29](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-evm/pull/29)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
* None

## CLOSED ISSUES
* None
